heading: Today
text: Some morning sun north, mixing with clouds in the afternoon. Seasonably warm, and less humid. Highs in the 80s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy north, becoming mostly cloudy south. Good chance of rain showers south of Route 4. Lows from the upper 50s to low 60s. Calm wind.

heading: Monday
text: Partly sunny north, mostly cloudy south. A chance of scattered showers and thunderstorms, mainly south of Rt. 4. Highs in the 80s north, a few 70s south. Calm wind turning southeast.
